response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency in Python-adjacent languages (TypeScript, Node.js), and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure — aligning well with the role’s core demands. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and agile practices further support fit, though limited explicit Python mastery and minimal evidence of LLM/ML product hands-on experience are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation at re:cinq
Deep expertise in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational ownership and open-source leadership with CI/CD, monitoring, and on-call readiness
concerns: Resume emphasizes TypeScript/Node.js/DLang; Python mastery is implied but not explicitly detailed
No clear evidence of direct LLM/ML product development or AI-native engineering environment exposure
German language skill is basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
